authenticatedRoutesNote: Dashboard, /trips, and /receipts/upload require a Supabase session. Run `pnpm test:e2e --grep @a11y` with E2E credentials for axe scans; Lighthouse on authenticated routes uses saved cookies manually (see STEP-049-baseline.md).
